notes: KMDF USB fx2 IOCTL dispatch and internal helpers. OsrFxEvtIoDeviceControl is EVT_WDF_IO_QUEUE_IO_DEVICE_CONTROL (registered in header). Internal helpers ResetPipe/StopAllPipes/etc. have no EVT_WDF declarations. No spinlocks — spinlock heuristic has no opportunity to fire. Confirms lock-free KMDF helpers are correctly classified as 'other' without needing heuristic suppression.

OsrFxEvtIoDeviceControl.label: other
OsrFxEvtIoDeviceControl.notes: EVT_WDF_IO_QUEUE_IO_DEVICE_CONTROL — I/O queue IOCTL dispatch callback. IRQL depends on queue dispatch type (typically PASSIVE_LEVEL for sequential queue). Out of scope for isr/dpc classification. Correctly classified via WDF registry.

ResetPipe.label: other
ResetPipe.notes: Internal helper: resets a USB pipe. Called from IOCTL handler. No spinlock. No WDF callback declaration.

StopAllPipes.label: other
StopAllPipes.notes: Internal helper: stops all USB pipes. No spinlock.

StartAllPipes.label: other
StartAllPipes.notes: Internal helper: starts all USB pipes. No spinlock.

ResetDevice.label: other
ResetDevice.notes: Internal helper: resets the USB device. No spinlock.

ReenumerateDevice.label: other
ReenumerateDevice.notes: Internal helper: triggers re-enumeration via IOCTL. No spinlock.

GetBarGraphState.label: other
GetBarGraphState.notes: Internal helper: reads bar graph LED state from device. No spinlock.

SetBarGraphState.label: other
SetBarGraphState.notes: Internal helper: sets bar graph LED state on device. No spinlock.

GetSevenSegmentState.label: other
GetSevenSegmentState.notes: Internal helper: reads seven-segment display state. No spinlock.

SetSevenSegmentState.label: other
SetSevenSegmentState.notes: Internal helper: sets seven-segment display state. No spinlock.

GetSwitchState.label: other
GetSwitchState.notes: Internal helper: reads DIP switch state from device. No spinlock.

OsrUsbIoctlGetInterruptMessage.label: other
OsrUsbIoctlGetInterruptMessage.notes: Internal helper: retrieves queued interrupt message for IOCTL_OSRUSBFX2_GET_INTERRUPT_MESSAGE. No spinlock. Not a registered WDF callback.
